languages.text: "Я гляжу, при новом-то Лорд-капитане дела пошли на лад. Куда ни посмотри, чистота, благодать, койки, опять же, новые..."

traits.locale_text: "Я гляжу, при новом-то Лорде-капитане дела пошли на лад. Куда ни посмотри, чистота, благодать, койки, опять же, новые..."

languages.text: "Things have improved under the new Lord Captain. Wherever you look, everything's spick and span, and we've got new beds again..."
languages.original_text: "Я гляжу, при новом-то Лорд-капитане дела пошли на лад. Куда ни посмотри, чистота, благодать, койки, опять же, новые..."

traits.locale_text: "Things have improved under the new Lord Captain. Wherever you look, everything's spick and span, and we've got new beds again..."
"Things have improved under the new Lord Captain. Wherever you look, everything's spick and span, and we've got new beds again..."
"Things have improved under the new Lord Captain. Wherever you look, everything's spick and span, and we've got new beds again..."

languages.text: 「新船長の下では、状況は改善されました。どこを見ても、すべてがピカピカで、また新しいベッドが手に入りました…」
languages.original_text: "Things have improved under the new Lord Captain. Wherever you look, everything's spick and span, and we've got new beds again..."

languages.text: "Yeni Lord Kaptan döneminde işler düzeldi. Nereye baksanız her şey tertemiz, yine yeni yataklarımız var..."
languages.original_text: "Things have improved under the new Lord Captain. Wherever you look, everything's spick and span, and we've got new beds again..."

traits.locale_text: "Yeni Lord Kaptan döneminde işler düzeldi. Nereye baksanız her şey tertemiz, yine yeni yataklarımız var..."

languages.text: “新舰长上任后确实好转不少。如今到处整洁如新，连床铺都换成了新的……”
languages.original_text: "Things have improved under the new Lord Captain. Wherever you look, everything's spick and span, and we've got new beds again..."

traits.locale_text: “新舰长上任后确实好转不少。如今到处整洁如新，连床铺都换成了新的……”

languages.text: "Unter dem neuen Lord Captain hat sich einiges verändert. Wohin man auch schaut, alles ist blitzblank und wir haben sogar neue Betten ..."
languages.original_text: "Things have improved under the new Lord Captain. Wherever you look, everything's spick and span, and we've got new beds again..."

traits.locale_text: "Unter dem neuen Lord Captain hat sich einiges verändert. Wohin man auch schaut, alles ist blitzblank und wir haben sogar neue Betten ..."

languages.text: « Les choses se sont améliorées depuis l'arrivée {mf|du nouveau seigneur-capitaine|de la nouvelle seigneure-capitaine}. Tout est propre, et on a même de nouveaux lits… »
languages.original_text: "Things have improved under the new Lord Captain. Wherever you look, everything's spick and span, and we've got new beds again..."

traits.locale_text: « Les choses se sont améliorées depuis l'arrivée {mf|du nouveau seigneur-capitaine|de la nouvelle seigneure-capitaine}. Tout est propre, et on a même de nouveaux lits… »

languages.text: «Las cosas han mejorado bajo {mf|el nuevo|la nueva} Lord Capitán. Mires donde mires, todo está limpio y tenemos camas nuevas...».
languages.original_text: "Things have improved under the new Lord Captain. Wherever you look, everything's spick and span, and we've got new beds again..."

traits.locale_text: «Las cosas han mejorado bajo {mf|el nuevo|la nueva} Lord Capitán. Mires donde mires, todo está limpio y tenemos camas nuevas...».
